title: Az's QoL Recipes
description: Various QoL crafting recipes, smelting, converting, Bulk smelting, Bulk compacting, uncraft, undye etc
body:
Az's Missing Recipes adds a variety of QoL Recipes. 


Tired of tedious gathering and limited options how you have to process materials ?
Well, wheter you're smelting rotten flesh to leather, uncraft and craft magma cream, nether wart, bone blocks, undye glass or wool ? - This mod got you!

Perfect for the little chocolate chip sprinkles on your modded playthrough or maybe you're a pack dev and want to give the player some much needed actions like 8 logs to chests or 2 logs to sticks... Efficient QoL Recipes, without breaking balance - lightweight and seamless!

Explore smarter gameplay today! 

**__Featured Recipes__:**

**crafting**
- 2 Logs to 16 Sticks
- 8 Logs to 4 Chests
- 1 of ANY dyed Glass to 1 Glass
- 1 of ANY dyed Wool to 1 White Wool
- 9 Bones to 3 Bone Blocks (respecting 1 bone to 3 bonemeal)
- 4 Brown Mushrooms to 1 Brown Mushroom Block
- 4 Red Mushrooms to 1 Red Mushroom Block
- 2 Red and 2 Brown Mushrooms to 1 Mushroom Stem Block
- 3 String to 1 Cobweb
- 1 Magma Block to 4 Magma Cream
- 4 Netherwart to 1 Netherwart Block
- 1 Netherwart Block to 4 Netherwart
- 4 Mud and 1 Wheat to 4 Packed Mud
- Sticky Piston can be crafted with 1 Honeycomb or 1 Honey Bottle
- 1 Honeycomb Block to 4 Honeycomb
- 1 Honeycomb and 3 Emtpy Bottles to 3 Honey Bottles
- 1 Amethyst Block to 4 Amethyst
- 1 Dripstone Block to 4 Pointed Dripstone
- 1 of ANY Terracotta to 1 Terracotta 
- 2 Mushrooms (ANY) and 2 Dirt to 3 Mycelium
- 2 Spruce Saplings and 2 Dirt to 3 Podzol

**stone cutting**

*   1 of ANY Wool to 4 string
- Chainmail-, Iron-, Gold-, Diamond Armor can now be recycled into 3 of respective base materials
- Chainmail-, Iron-, Gold-, Diamond Horse Armor can now be recycled into 1 of respective base materials
- Leather Horse Armor can now be recycled into 3 Leather

**shapeless crafting (2x2 crafting grid!)**

*   3 Wheat to 3 Bread
*   3 Gravel to 2 Flint
*   3 Sugar Cane to 1 Paper

**smelting (furnace)**

*   1 Rotten Flesh to 1 Leather

**smelting (blast furnace)**

*   1 Raw Copper Block to 1 Copper Block (slightly higher cooking time)
*   1 Raw Iron Block to 1 Iron Block (slightly higher cooking time)
*   1 Raw Gold Block to 1 Gold Block (slightly higher cooking time)

**smoker**

*   1 Rotten Flesh to 1 Leather (quicker cooking)
*   1 of ANY Sapling to 1 Dead Bush

**smithing table**

- Iron Horse Armor can be crafted by applying 2 Iron Ingot(both slots - 1 each) to Leather Horse Armor 
- Gold Horse Armor can be crafted by applying 2 Gold Ingot(both slots - 1 each) to Iron Horse Armor 
- Diamond Horse Armor can be crafted by applying 2 Diamond(both slots - 1 each) to Gold Horse Armor

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
